input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.7.2
            TITLE: if the two conditions in ev.4.7.1 occur at the same time:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.7.2: If the two conditions in EV.4.7.1 occur at the same time:
EV.4.7.2 If the two conditions in EV.4.7.1 occur at the same time:  
a. Power to the Motor(s) must be immediately and completely shut down 
b. The Motor shut down must stay active until the APPS signals less than 5% Pedal Travel, 
with or without brake operation  
The team must be able to demonstrate these actions at Technical Inspection

final_answer: rule EV.4.7.2: If the two conditions in EV.4.7.1 occur at the same time: a. Power to the Motor(s) must be immediately and completely shut down b. The Motor shut down must stay active until the APPS signals less than 5% Pedal Travel, with or without brake operation The team must be able to demonstrate these actions at Technical Inspection
